code: var COMMIT="COMMIT";var ADD_COMMIT="ADDCOMMIT";var initialState={commitData:[],newCommitChanges:""};var commitDataReducer=function commitDataReducer(){var state=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:initialState;var action=arguments.length>1?arguments[1]:undefined;switch(action.type){case COMMIT:state.newCommitChanges=action.newCommit;return state;case ADD_COMMIT:var newCommit={id:5,messege:state.newCommitChanges,like:23};state.commitData.push(newCommit);state.newCommitChanges="";return state;default:return state;}};export default commitDataReducer;export var commitActin=function commitActin(text){return{type:COMMIT,newCommit:text};};export var addCommitActin=function addCommitActin(){return{type:ADD_COMMIT};};
